ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "numbers_matched" TEXT /* Number of numbers matched in the game (e.g., Match 5 and 2 Euro Numbers) */,
  "prize_per_winner" TEXT /* Prize amount per winner */,
  "latvian_winners" INTEGER /* Number of winners in Latvia */,
  "prize_fund_amount" TEXT /* Total prize fund amount */,
  "total_winners" INTEGER /* Total number of winners */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region associated with the game result */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* Date of the draw */,
  "game_variant" TEXT /* Specific variant of the game */,
  "jackpot_carryover" TEXT /* Amount carried over from the previous draw */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of game (e.g., jackpot, raffle) */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the game */,
  "winning_odds" TEXT /* Odds of winning the game */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game is currently active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the game was introduced */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the game was discontinued */,
  "max_prize" TEXT /* Maximum prize amount for the game */,
  "min_prize" TEXT /* Minimum prize amount for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Player's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Player's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Player's address */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region the player is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winnings" (
  "winnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winning entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* The game the player won */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* The player who won */,
  "amount" TEXT /* The amount won */,
  "draw_date" TEXT /* The date of the draw */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* The status of the claim (e.g., claimed, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winnings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_winnings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country the region is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's username */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mappings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* The role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Number of numbers matched in the game (e.g., Match 5 and 2 Euro Numbers)
Region associated with the game result
Amount carried over from the previous draw
Indicates if the game is currently active
Maximum prize amount for the game
Minimum prize amount for the game
